/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -flto -shared  -o my_engine_binding.cpython-310-aarch64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/my_engine_binding.dir/bindings.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/cuda/lib64  -L/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/aarch64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/aarch64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda/lib64:/home/pi/kx/TensorRT-LLM/tensorrt_llm/libs:/home/pi/kx/TensorRT-LLM/cpp/build/tensorrt_llm/plugins ../libtrtcppinference.a /usr/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.8.0 ../external/tokenizers-cpp/libtokenizers_cpp.a -lnvinfer -lcudart /home/pi/kx/TensorRT-LLM/tensorrt_llm/libs/libtensorrt_llm.so /home/pi/kx/TensorRT-LLM/cpp/build/tensorrt_llm/plugins/libnvinfer_plugin_tensorrt_llm.so /usr/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.8.0 ../external/tokenizers-cpp/aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu/release/libtokenizers_c.a -ldl ../external/tokenizers-cpp/sentencepiece/src/libsentencepiece.a -latomic -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
